# Mohit_Garnaik
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Mohit Garnaik — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --bg: #f5f0e8;
  --bg2: #ede7d9;
  --dark: #1a1a2e;
  --dark2: #16213e;
  --ink: #1a1a2e;
  --muted: #5a5a72;
  --accent: #e85d26;
  --accent2: #f2a65a;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --border: #d4ccc0;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--ink);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200;
  background: var(--dark);
  padding: 0 60px;
  height: 60px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
}
.nav-logo {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 800;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--white);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.nav-logo span { color: var(--accent); }
.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 28px; list-style: none; }
.nav-links a {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent2); }

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background: var(--dark);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 0.9fr;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 80px 60px 60px;
  gap: 60px;
}
.hero-label {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent2);
  margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.hero-label::before {
  content: '';
  width: 28px; height: 2px;
  background: var(--accent);
}
.hero-name {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 5.5vw, 5rem);
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--white);
  line-height: 1.0;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.hero-sub {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
.hero-bio {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.78);
  font-size: 0.94rem;
  max-width: 500px;
  line-height: 1.8;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
}

.hero-contacts { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
.hc-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
}
.hc-icon {
  width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 6px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.hc-item a { color: var(--accent2); text-decoration: none; }

.btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 14px 30px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
}
.btn:hover { background: #d44e1c; transform: translateY(-2px); }

.hero-right {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  gap: 28px;
}
.photo-wrap {
  position: relative;
  width: 300px;
}
.photo-wrap::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -10px; right: -10px;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  border: 3px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  z-index: 0;
}
.photo-wrap img {
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  width: 300px; height: 370px;
  object-fit: cover; object-position: top center;
  border-radius: 6px;
  display: block;
}

.hero-stats {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 16px; width: 300px;
}
.stat-box {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 16px;
  text-align: center;
}
.stat-num {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--accent2);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.stat-lbl {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* ── SECTION WRAPPER ── */
.sec { padding: 80px 60px; }
.sec-alt { background: var(--bg2); }
.sec-dark { background: var(--dark2); }

.sec-label {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.sec-label::before {
  content: ''; width: 20px; height: 2px; background: var(--accent);
}
.sec-title {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 800;
  color: var(--ink);
  margin-bottom: 48px;
  line-height: 1.1;
}
.sec-dark .sec-title { color: var(--white); }
.sec-dark .sec-label { color: var(--accent2); }
.sec-dark .sec-label::before { background: var(--accent2); }

/* ── EXPERIENCE ── */
.exp-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 40px; }
.exp-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 32px;
  border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(26,26,46,0.07);
}
.exp-header {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 6px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.exp-role {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--dark);
}
.exp-badge {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.exp-org {
  font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.exp-bullets { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; }
.exp-bullets li {
  font-size: 0.9rem; color: #2c2c42;
  padding-left: 20px; position: relative;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.exp-bullets li::before {
  content: '→';
  position: absolute; left: 0;
  color: var(--accent); font-size: 0.78rem; top: 1px;
}

/* ── PROJECTS ── */
.proj-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(290px, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
}
.proj-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 26px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(26,26,46,0.06);
  border-top: 3px solid transparent;
  transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.proj-card:hover {
  border-top-color: var(--accent);
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(26,26,46,0.12);
}
.proj-period {
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  background: rgba(232,93,38,0.08);
  display: inline-block; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 4px;
}
.proj-name {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 10px;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.proj-desc { font-size: 0.86rem; color: #4a4a60; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.tag-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; }
.tag {
  font-size: 0.69rem; font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--dark2);
  background: #eceaf5;
  padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 4px;
}

/* ── SKILLS ── */
.skills-wrap {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
}
.skill-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 24px;
}
.skill-card-title {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--accent2);
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  padding-bottom: 10px;
}
.skill-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  padding: 6px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.skill-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.skill-item::before {
  content: '';
  width: 6px; height: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--accent);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── EDUCATION ── */
.edu-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(270px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
}
.edu-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 26px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(26,26,46,0.07);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.edu-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
}
.edu-year {
  font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  background: rgba(232,93,38,0.08);
  display: inline-block; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.edu-degree {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 7px; line-height: 1.3;
}
.edu-school { font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.edu-score {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  background: var(--dark);
  padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 4px;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
.contact-wrap {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 60px; align-items: start;
}
.contact-text {
  font-size: 0.95rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  line-height: 1.8; margin-top: 16px;
}
.contact-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
.contact-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 16px 20px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
}
.cc-icon {
  width: 42px; height: 42px; flex-shrink: 0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: rgba(232,93,38,0.15);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.cc-lbl {
  font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  margin-bottom: 3px;
}
.cc-val {
  font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
}
.cc-val a { color: var(--accent2); text-decoration: none; }

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer {
  background: #0d0d1a;
  padding: 24px 60px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  nav { padding: 0 20px; }
  .nav-links { gap: 16px; }
  .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 80px 24px 48px; gap: 40px; text-align: center; }
  .hero-bio { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
  .hero-contacts { align-items: center; }
  .hero-right { order: -1; }
  .hero-stats { width: 100%; }
  .sec, .sec-alt, .sec-dark { padding: 60px 24px; }
  .contact-wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 36px; }
  footer { padding: 20px 24px; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Mohit<span>.</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="about">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-label">Open to Internships · Bangalore</div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Mohit<br>Garnaik</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">PGDM — Operations &amp; Supply Chain · ISBR Business School</p>
    <p class="hero-bio">
      Pharmacy graduate turned supply chain professional — blending pharmaceutical manufacturing expertise with operations management. Hands-on experience in inventory analytics, procurement coordination, GMP compliance, and MIS reporting. Available for a 2-month internship across Ops, SCM, Pharma Logistics, or FinTech roles.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-contacts">
      <div class="hc-item">
        <div class="hc-icon">
          <svg width="15" height="15" fill="none" stroke="#e85d26" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 0 1 4.69 12 19.79 19.79 0 0 1 1.62 3.38 2 2 0 0 1 3.6 1h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 .7 2.81 2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 5.51 5.51l.95-.95a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 21 16.92z"/></svg>
        </div>
        +91 9861022455
      </div>
      <div class="hc-item">
        <div class="hc-icon">
          <svg width="15" height="15" fill="none" stroke="#e85d26" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
        </div>
        mohitgarnaik2003@gmail.com
      </div>
      <div class="hc-item">
        <div class="hc-icon">
          <svg width="15" height="15" fill="none" stroke="#e85d26" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/><rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/></svg>
        </div>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/mohit-garnaik" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/mohit-garnaik</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a href="mailto:mohitgarnaik2003@gmail.com" class="btn">
      <svg width="14" height="14" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.5" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
      Hire Me
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="photo-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mohit Garnaik" />
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat-box">
        <div class="stat-num">8.67</div>
        <div class="stat-lbl">B.Pharm CGPA</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-box">
        <div class="stat-num">98%</div>
        <div class="stat-lbl">Stock Accuracy</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-box">
        <div class="stat-num">200+</div>
        <div class="stat-lbl">SKUs Managed</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-box">
        <div class="stat-num">0</div>
        <div class="stat-lbl">Non-Conformances</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
<section class="sec" id="experience">
  <div class="sec-label">Career History</div>
  <div class="sec-title">Professional Experience</div>
  <div class="exp-list">

    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div class="exp-role">Hospital Pharmacy Intern</div>
        <div class="exp-badge">1 Month · Rourkela, Odisha</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-org">Hospital Pharmacy Internship</div>
      <ul class="exp-bullets">
        <li>Managed daily inventory reconciliation across 200+ SKUs, maintaining 98%+ stock accuracy</li>
        <li>Tracked expiry dates and enforced FEFO stock rotation to minimise wastage</li>
        <li>Coordinated with procurement team for timely replenishment of critical medicines, reducing stockouts</li>
        <li>Estimated demand based on patient flow trends, supporting data-driven procurement planning</li>
        <li>Maintained purchase and issue records for audit compliance — zero non-conformances reported</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="exp-card">
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div class="exp-role">Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Intern</div>
        <div class="exp-badge">1 Month · Baddi, Himachal Pradesh</div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-org">Pharmaceutical Industry Internship</div>
      <ul class="exp-bullets">
        <li>Supported raw material planning and inward inventory verification for production batches</li>
        <li>Assisted in batch-wise material issuance and production coordination to minimise delays</li>
        <li>Ensured documentation accuracy in BMR/BPR for GMP audit readiness</li>
        <li>Coordinated with QA &amp; production teams to identify and resolve material bottlenecks</li>
        <li>Observed end-to-end warehouse operations including inward, storage, and issuance flows</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section class="sec sec-alt" id="projects">
  <div class="sec-label">Academic &amp; Field Work</div>
  <div class="sec-title">Projects</div>
  <div class="proj-grid">

    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-period">Nov 2025 – Mar 2026</div>
      <div class="proj-name">Responsible Citizenship Project — APD</div>
      <p class="proj-desc">Conducted on-site accessibility audits of public and commercial spaces using the 'Yes to Access' app. Evaluated 10+ parameters and supported school operations for children with locomotor and hearing disabilities.</p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag">Field Audit</span>
        <span class="tag">Compliance</span>
        <span class="tag">Documentation</span>
        <span class="tag">Operations</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-period">Academic</div>
      <div class="proj-name">SCM Happenings — Indian Fashion Retail</div>
      <p class="proj-desc">Analysed supply chain dynamics across Myntra, AJIO, Meesho, Fabindia, ABFRL, and Tata CLiQ using Bullwhip Effect, Chopra &amp; Meindl, Gravity Model, and Reverse Logistics frameworks.</p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag">Supply Chain</span>
        <span class="tag">Reverse Logistics</span>
        <span class="tag">Bullwhip Effect</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-period">Academic</div>
      <div class="proj-name">IMC Strategy — Skippi Ice Pops</div>
      <p class="proj-desc">Developed an Integrated Marketing Communications strategy with consumer persona decks, channel frameworks, and brand positioning analysis presented as a structured PowerPoint deliverable.</p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag">Brand Strategy</span>
        <span class="tag">Consumer Persona</span>
        <span class="tag">IMC</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="proj-card">
      <div class="proj-period">Academic</div>
      <div class="proj-name">MSME NBFC — AI-Driven Loan Decision System</div>
      <p class="proj-desc">Prepared a presentation on an ethical AI-driven loan decision support system for MSMEs, exploring credit risk frameworks, algorithmic fairness, and operational integration in FinTech lending.</p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag">FinTech</span>
        <span class="tag">AI Ethics</span>
        <span class="tag">Credit Risk</span>
        <span class="tag">MSME</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section class="sec sec-dark" id="skills">
  <div class="sec-label">Core Competencies</div>
  <div class="sec-title">Skills &amp; Tools</div>
  <div class="skills-wrap">
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-title">Data &amp; Analytics</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Advanced Excel (Pivot, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP)</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Dashboard Design &amp; MIS Reporting</div>
      <div class="skill-item">KPI Tracking &amp; Performance Reporting</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Inventory Analytics</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Power BI &amp; Python (Learning)</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-title">Operations &amp; SCM</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Supply Chain Management Fundamentals</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Inventory Management (FEFO Rotation)</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Procurement &amp; Vendor Coordination</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Demand Planning &amp; Forecasting</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Warehouse Operations</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-title">Pharma &amp; Compliance</div>
      <div class="skill-item">GMP &amp; SOP Compliance</div>
      <div class="skill-item">BMR/BPR Documentation</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Process Auditing</div>
      <div class="skill-item">QA &amp; Production Coordination</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Regulatory Documentation</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-title">Languages</div>
      <div class="skill-item">English — Professional Proficiency</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Hindi — Native</div>
      <div class="skill-item">Odia — Native</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- EDUCATION -->
<section class="sec" id="education">
  <div class="sec-label">Academic Background</div>
  <div class="sec-title">Education</div>
  <div class="edu-grid">
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">2025 — Present</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">PGDM — Operations &amp; Supply Chain Management</div>
      <div class="edu-school">ISBR Business School, Bangalore</div>
      <div class="edu-score">Pursuing</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">2021 – 2025</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">B. Pharmacy</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Kanak Manjari Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Rourkela · BPUT</div>
      <div class="edu-score">CGPA: 8.67 / 10</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">2021</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">Higher Secondary (Class XII)</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Municipal HS School, Rourkela</div>
      <div class="edu-score">72%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <div class="edu-year">2018</div>
      <div class="edu-degree">Matriculation (Class X)</div>
      <div class="edu-school">Kendriya Vidyalaya Bondamunda, Rourkela</div>
      <div class="edu-score">70%</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="sec sec-dark" id="contact">
  <div class="contact-wrap">
    <div>
      <div class="sec-label">Let's Connect</div>
      <div class="sec-title">Get In Touch</div>
      <p class="contact-text">
        Actively seeking a 2-month mandatory internship in Bangalore across Operations, Supply Chain Management, Pharma Logistics, or FinTech roles. My B.Pharm background gives me a genuine edge in pharma and healthcare supply chain roles. If you see a fit, I'd love to connect.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-cards">
      <div class="contact-card">
        <div class="cc-icon">
          <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#e85d26" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 0 1 4.69 12 19.79 19.79 0 0 1 1.62 3.38 2 2 0 0 1 3.6 1h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 .7 2.81 2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 5.51 5.51l.95-.95a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 21 16.92z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="cc-lbl">Phone</div>
          <div class="cc-val">+91 9861022455</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-card">
        <div class="cc-icon">
          <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#e85d26" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="cc-lbl">Email</div>
          <div class="cc-val"><a href="mailto:mohitgarnaik2003@gmail.com">mohitgarnaik2003@gmail.com</a></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-card">
        <div class="cc-icon">
          <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#e85d26" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/><rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="cc-lbl">LinkedIn</div>
          <div class="cc-val"><a href="https://linkedin.com/in/mohit-garnaik" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/mohit-garnaik</a></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-card">
        <div class="cc-icon">
          <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="#e85d26" stroke-width="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 0 1-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1 1 11.314 0z"/><path d="M15 11a3 3 0 1 1-6 0 3 3 0 0 1 6 0z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="cc-lbl">Location</div>
          <div class="cc-val">Bangalore, Karnataka</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
